findings.title: Outdated Gin framework with known vulnerabilities
findings.description: Gin v1.7.4 has known security vulnerabilities including path traversal and request handling issues

findings.title: Outdated gopkg.in/yaml.v2 with deserialization issues
findings.description: yaml.v2 v2.4.0 is a legacy package with known parsing issues superseded by yaml.v3

findings.title: Outdated golang.org/x/crypto with security fixes missing
findings.description: Transitive dependency golang.org/x/crypto pinned to 2020-era version missing years of security patches

findings.title: Outdated go-playground/validator with input validation bypass
findings.description: validator/v10 v10.4.1 has known validation logic issues affecting Gin request binding
